scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:cli && bun run build:tui && bun run build:tokmeter && bun run build:web
scripts.ensure:tokmeter: test -f packages/tokmeter/dist/core/index.js || (bun run build:core && bun run build:cli && bun run build:tui && bun run build:tokmeter)
scripts.drishti: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts
scripts.drishti:live: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts live
scripts.drishti:serve: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts serve
scripts.drishti:statusline: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts statusline
scripts.daemon:start: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts daemon start
scripts.daemon:stop: cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts daemon stop
scripts.daemon:status: cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts daemon status
scripts.install:statusline: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts install-statusline
scripts.install:mcp: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts install-mcp
scripts.uninstall:statusline: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts uninstall-statusline
scripts.uninstall:mcp: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts uninstall-mcp
scripts.list:editors: bun run ensure:tokmeter && cd packages/mcp && bun src/cli.ts editors
scripts.bar:ship: bun run clean && bun run bar:release && bun run bar:publish
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo packages/macos-bar/.build packages/macos-bar/*.app packages/macos-bar/*.zip packages/macos-bar/*.dSYM packages/macos-bar/*.dSYM.zip && find packages -path '*/src/*' \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.d.ts' \) -delete 2>/dev/null; true
